/usr/bin/ar qc libcedar_cypher.a CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/cypher_engine.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/parser.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/parser_temporal.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/execution_plan.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/expression_evaluator.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/value.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/fingerprint.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/temporal_dialect.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/cost_optimizer.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/operators/temporal_operators.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/operators/write_operators.cc.o CMakeFiles/cedar_cypher.dir/src/cypher/validator.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcedar_cypher.a
